title: 拔苗助长
meaning: 比喻违反客观规律，急于求成

scenes.title: 禾苗生长
scenes.prompt: Seedlings growing in a rice field, cartoon style, patient farmer
scenes.narration: 有个农夫种了禾苗，希望它们快点长高。

scenes.title: 拔高禾苗
scenes.prompt: A farmer pulling seedlings to make them taller, cartoon style, bad idea
scenes.narration: 他把禾苗一棵棵往上拔，想让它们长快点。

scenes.title: 禾苗枯萎
scenes.prompt: Wilted seedlings in a field with a sad farmer, cartoon style, lesson learned
scenes.narration: 结果禾苗全都枯死了，急于求成反而坏事。
